tooltips.WARN: The check needs human review but is not blocked by itself.
tooltips.FAIL: The check failed and must be resolved before proceeding.
tooltips.BLOCKED: A required safety gate prevents further action.
tooltips.REVIEW REQUIRED: Human review is required before any next step.
tooltips.READY: The item is ready for review, not automatically approved.
tooltips.protected files: Protected files require special approval before changes.
tooltips.DAILY_METRICS: Reports/DAILY_METRICS.csv is protected and must not be edited by this prototype.
tooltips.CHECKPOINT_INDEX: Reports/CHECKPOINT_INDEX.md is protected and must not be edited by this prototype.
tooltips.trading readiness: Trading readiness is visibility-only and does not enable execution.
tooltips.next safe action: The next safe action is a human review instruction, not an automated action.
tooltips.voice guide: The voice guide is optional, non-blocking, and must not execute commands.
tooltips.fixture-only data: Fixture-only data is static test content and is not live telemetry or production data.
